title: Southern Farmhouse Revival
location: 1268 GA Hwy 208, Hamilton, Harris County, Georgia 31811
intro_paragraphs: Cloudland Pastures is a picturesque 101± acre working homestead on Lookout Mountain in northwest Georgia. The land unfolds across gently rolling pastureland framed by wooded edges that provide both privacy and natural beauty.

A 2,350± square foot farmhouse with a recently painted exterior and newer roof sits on a hill overlooking the property. The home includes two bedrooms and two baths, along with a living room, office, and mud room.
With frontage along both Alabama Highway 103 and Golf Course Road, access to the property is convenient and straightforward.
brokers_comment: With rolling pastures, three ponds, and a hilltop farmhouse, Cloudland Pastures is a versatile mountain property that’s immediately usable and well located near Mentone, Chattanooga, and McLemore.
facts: Picturesque 101± acre working homestead in northwest Georgia, well-suited for horses or cattle, small-scale agriculture, or recreational use
Beautiful landscape offers distant mountain views and gently rolling pastures lined and wooded edges
Located in Cloudland, GA on Lookout Mountain in Chattooga County
3± acre fishing and livestock pond and two additional smaller ponds
2,350± sq. ft. farmhouse with a recently painted exterior and newer roof, 2 bedrooms and 2 baths
Barn measuring approximately 120 ft x 125 ft with both open and enclosed storage and working pens for livestock

helpful_links.description: Scan the QR code on your phone to open the Meadows-Hale parcel map. Use it for driving directions to the residence and to see property boundaries while you are on site.

detail_tabs.label: Location
paragraphs: Located on Lookout Mountain in Chattooga County, Georgia, with frontage along Alabama Highway 103 and Golf Course Road.
